title: Email Subject Line Generator
main_prompt: Generate 5 email subject lines for [Product Name] targeting [Audience]. Focus on: - Urgency - Benefits - Curiosity
short_description: Create effective email subject lines that increase open rates.
long_description: Generate compelling email subject lines for marketing campaigns. Input your product name and target audience to get 5 creative subject line options.

title: Code Review Assistant
main_prompt: Review the following code for bugs, security issues, and best practices:\n\n[Code Snippet]
short_description: Get AI-powered code reviews to improve code quality and security.
long_description: Review code for bugs, security issues, and best practices. Simply paste your code snippet to get a detailed review with actionable suggestions.

title: Content Summarizer
main_prompt: Summarize the following article in 3-5 bullet points:\n\n[Article Text]
short_description: Extract key information from long texts quickly and efficiently.
long_description: Summarize long articles or documents into key points. Paste your article text to get a concise summary with the most important information.
